description_full:
## Elevate Your Drywall Workflow with the Asgard Hammer

Experience a new benchmark in professional drywall finishing with the Asgard Hammer Automatic Taper. Engineered for contractors who demand reliability and precision, this tool streamlines the taping process by simultaneously applying joint tape and the exact amount of compound required. By integrating high-grade materials with an ergonomic design, the Hammer reduces physical strain while significantly accelerating your daily output on the job site.

## Built for the Demanding Professional

Durability is at the core of the AT01-AD design. Constructed with robust stainless steel side plates and a hard-anodized push rod, this taper is built to withstand the harsh, high-moisture environments typical of drywall installation. The inclusion of a specialized cable drum ensures smooth, consistent operation, while the tool-free maintenance design allows you to spend more time working and less time servicing your equipment.

## Key Features

- **Precision Application:** Simultaneously dispenses tape and compound for a seamless, professional finish every time.

- **High-Reach Efficiency:** Equipped with a dedicated control tube flange, allowing for effortless tape cutting even when working on high ceilings or elevated surfaces.
- **Tool-Free Maintenance:** The streamlined tube protector design simplifies cleaning and upkeep, requiring no additional tools for disassembly.

name: Asgard 2.5" Angle Head
description_full:
## Achieve Flawless Internal Corners with Precision

Elevate your drywall finishing standards with the Asgard 2.5" Angle Head. Engineered for professionals who demand speed without sacrificing quality, this tool is designed to feather joint compound across both sides of an internal corner simultaneously. Whether you are tackling vertical wall-to-wall joints or horizontal wall-to-ceiling transitions, this angle head delivers a consistent, professional-grade finish in one efficient motion.

## Streamline Your Taping Workflow

Integrating seamlessly into your existing taping setup, the Asgard Angle Head is the perfect follow-up to your corner roller. Once your tape is firmly embedded, this tool glides effortlessly to wipe down excess compound, leaving behind a smooth, feathered edge that requires minimal sanding. By reducing manual touch-ups, it significantly cuts down on labor time while ensuring your corners are ready for the final coat.

## Key Features

- **Dual-Sided Efficiency:** Simultaneously feathers both sides of an internal corner for a perfectly symmetrical finish in a single pass.
- **Versatile Application:** Optimized for use on both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling intersections.
- **Professional Consistency:** Eliminates the guesswork of manual feathering, providing uniform results across every room.
- **Optimized Workflow:** Designed to work in tandem with corner rollers to accelerate the taping process.
- **Durable Construction:** Built to withstand the rigors of daily job site use while maintaining precision performance.

## Technical Specifications

| Specification | Detail |
| :--- | :--- |
| Brand | Asgard |
| Product Name | 2.5" Angle Head |
| SKU | AH25-AD |
| UPC | 0873876004539 |
| Tool Size | 2.5 inches |
| Application | Internal corner finishing |
description_short: The Asgard® 2.5" Angle Head streamlines the process of feathering joint compound on both sides of internal corners with precision in a single pass. Ideal for wall-to-wall or wall-to-ceiling corners, this tool is an essential component of the taping process. After the joint tape is set into the corner using acorner roller, the 2.5" Angle Head efficiently wipes down the corner, ensuring seamless results.

## Achieve Flawless Internal Corners with Precision

Elevate your drywall finishing standards with the Asgard 3" Adjustable Angle Head. Engineered for professionals who demand efficiency and consistency, this tool streamlines the process of feathering joint compound on internal corners. Whether you are tackling wall-to-wall joints or ceiling transitions, this finisher delivers a smooth, professional-grade result in a single, fluid pass.

## Advanced Control and Versatility

What sets the Asgard Angle Head apart is its intuitive tension management system. By engaging or disengaging the integrated rear tension springs, you gain precise control over the spring pressure, allowing you to adapt to varying corner conditions and compound consistencies. The inclusion of high-performance wheels ensures the tool glides effortlessly across surfaces, while the spring-loaded design intelligently compensates for minor imperfections in framing or drywall installation, ensuring a clean finish every time.

## Key Features

- **Precision Feathering:** Simultaneously finishes both sides of an internal corner for maximum productivity.
- **Adjustable Tension:** Customizable spring pressure settings allow for tailored performance based on your specific project needs.
- **Smooth Operation:** Equipped with precision wheels to minimize drag and ensure a consistent, streak-free application.
- **Versatile Compatibility:** Seamlessly integrates with the CA08-AD corner applicator for standard finishing, or attaches to FH-AD/XH-AD support handles via the CFA-AD adapter for specialized taping tasks.
